title: Apothecary
description: A potion expansion with a large variety of different effects
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11e2efef0f38ec60e3d378fdbba27dcc3e88c119.png)

# **Description:**



Apothecary is a potion expansion designed to introduce a diverse array of potion effects that enhance both utility, combat and much more. With many new beneficial and harmful effects included this mod offers a comprehensive selection of potions tailored to meet your needs and to make the game more challenging if need be, with it also including some potions for existing vanilla effects as well. While also including some overall potion related features such as potion effect descriptions or world events.



This mod comes with extensive configurability so you can customize potions/effects your liking.

As of now this mod adds 25 new effects

**Effects:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Positive Effects: **

Iron Skin - Provides +4 Armor points


Diamond Skin - Provides +4 Armor toughness


Archery - Increases arrow damage by +3


Wrath - Increases all damage dealt by +10%


Flight - Grants creative flight


Reach - Increases reach by +1


Repairing - Repairs items in inventory at random intervals


Magic Power - Increases magic damage by +10%


Mana Regeneration - Increases mana regeneration by +25% (irons spellbooks)


Thorns - Reflect 20% of damage dealt back to attackers


Purification - Grants immunity to all harmful effects


Extension - Increases the duration of all active effects


**Negative Effects:**


Broken Armor - Reduces -4 Armor points


Ruptured Armor - Reduces -4 Armor toughness


Misfire - Decreases arrow damage by -4


Feeble - Decreases damage dealt by -10%


Vunerable - Increases damage taken by -20%


Magic Drain - Decreases magic damage by -10%


Magic Exhaustion - Decreases mana regeneration by -25% (irons spellbooks)


Confusion - Inverts controls


Corruption - Grants immunity to all beneficial effects


Burning - Sets you ablaze with fire doing more damage per level


Shocked - Decreases movement speed by -50%


Reversion - Decreases the duration of all active effects


**Vanilla Potions:**


Health Boost


Wither


Luck (recipe)


Resistance

</details>



Apothecary also enhances the game with dynamic world events that make effects more interactive, As going about playing the game you could get inflicted with a dangerous negative effect or a positive one. These events can inflict various effects, adding an exciting layer of unpredictability to gameplay.


**World Events:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Vanilla Events:

Broken armor effect can be inflicted by explosions when wearing armor

Ruptured armor effect can be inflicted by explosions when wearing armor and the damage of the explosion reaches a certain amount, also applied by piglin brutes

Direct lightning strikes can inflict the shocked effect

Any mob attack can inflict the feeble effect very rarely

Blazes can occasionally inflict the burning effect for a short time

Illusioners can inflict the confusion effect rarely

Allows witches to throw many new potions added by this mod when attacking a player


Compat Events:

Necromancers can inflict mana exaustion and magic drain (ironsspellbooks)

Blood can inflict indolence (biomesoplenty)

Acid can inflict corrosion (alexscaves)

</details>



World event features will be expanded upon


Also adds a few potion related features that should exist in minecraft (all configurable)


Adds an option to make potions have an enchanted glow (disabled by default)


Adds an option to change max potion stack size (vanilla stack size by default)


Adds an option to enable potion description tooltips to display what the effect does (disabled by default)
Highly inspired by [Enchantment Descriptions!](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c12f13bc1271f7989242da31aab502a2ece1450c.png)

 

This mod is planned to expand more on effects and mod compatabilities

Retextures for most effect icons are planned
